title: Assistant Store Manager - Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
